Name: Jasper MNK Events
Description: General-purpose Monk event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Monk ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Feint TB
Events.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Events.Name: Riddle of Earth Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Riddle of Earth when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for Riddle of Earth emergency use.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Monk ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Feint TB
Logics.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Logics.Name: Riddle of Earth Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Riddle of Earth when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.
